languages.text: {n}Идира запускает обе руки себе в волосы и с силой взъерошивает их.{/n} "Неправильно, неправильно это!" {n}Она обхватывает голову, слегка раскачиваясь.{/n} "Они только кажутся настоящими, Ваша Светлость, а присмотришься... половина призраки, а вторая половина с вырезанными душами ходит. Гиблое место, плохое. Нам нужно убираться отсюда, и забрать с собой тех, кто еще жив".

{n}Idira plunges both hands into her hair, violently tousling it.{/n} "Wrong, this is wrong!" {n}She wraps her arms around her head, swaying slightly.{/n} "They only seem real, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but when you look closer... half are ghosts, and the other half are walking around with their souls cut out. This is a deathtrap, a bad place. We need to get out of here, and take any still alive with us."
languages.original_text: {n}Идира запускает обе руки себе в волосы и с силой взъерошивает их.{/n} "Неправильно, неправильно это!" {n}Она обхватывает голову, слегка раскачиваясь.{/n} "Они только кажутся настоящими, Ваша Светлость, а присмотришься... половина призраки, а вторая половина с вырезанными душами ходит. Гиблое место, плохое. Нам нужно убираться отсюда, и забрать с собой тех, кто еще жив".

This is a deathtrap, a bad place. We need to get out of here, and take any still alive with us."

This is a deathtrap, a bad place. We need to get out of here, and take any still alive with us."

languages.text: {n}伊迪拉双手插进头发里，狠狠乱抓一气。{/n}“不对，这不对！”{n}她抱住自己的头，微微摇晃着。{/n}“它们只是看起来很真实，舰长大人，可您要是细看……里头有一半是鬼魂，另一半全是被掏走灵魂的行尸走肉。这是死亡陷阱，是不祥之地。我们得离开这儿，把还活着的人全都带走。”
languages.original_text: {n}Idira plunges both hands into her hair, violently tousling it.{/n} "Wrong, this is wrong!" {n}She wraps her arms around her head, swaying slightly.{/n} "They only seem real, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but when you look closer... half are ghosts, and the other half are walking around with their souls cut out. This is a deathtrap, a bad place. We need to get out of here, and take any still alive with us."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊迪拉双手插进头发里，狠狠乱抓一气。{/n}“不对，这不对！”{n}她抱住自己的头，微微摇晃着。{/n}“它们只是看起来很真实，舰长大人，可您要是细看……里头有一半是鬼魂，另一半全是被掏走灵魂的行尸走肉。这是死亡陷阱，是不祥之地。我们得离开这儿，把还活着的人全都带走。”

languages.text: {n}Idira plonge les deux mains dans ses cheveux qu'elle ébouriffe brutalement.{/n} « Un cauchemar, c'est un véritable cauchemar ! » {n}Elle enroule les bras autour de sa tête tout en se balançant légèrement d'avant en arrière.{/n} « Ils ont l'air réels, Votre Seigneurie, mais quand on y regarde de plus près... la moitié sont des fantômes, et les autres errent comme des carcasses vidées de leurs âmes. C'est un piège mortel, un lieu de perdition. Nous devons sortir d'ici et emmener tous les survivants avec nous. »
languages.original_text: {n}Idira plunges both hands into her hair, violently tousling it.{/n} "Wrong, this is wrong!" {n}She wraps her arms around her head, swaying slightly.{/n} "They only seem real, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but when you look closer... half are ghosts, and the other half are walking around with their souls cut out. This is a deathtrap, a bad place. We need to get out of here, and take any still alive with us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Idira plonge les deux mains dans ses cheveux qu'elle ébouriffe brutalement.{/n} « Un cauchemar, c'est un véritable cauchemar ! » {n}Elle enroule les bras autour de sa tête tout en se balançant légèrement d'avant en arrière.{/n} « Ils ont l'air réels, Votre Seigneurie, mais quand on y regarde de plus près... la moitié sont des fantômes, et les autres errent comme des carcasses vidées de leurs âmes. C'est un piège mortel, un lieu de perdition. Nous devons sortir d'ici et emmener tous les survivants avec nous. »

languages.text: {n}İdira, iki elini de saçlarına daldırıp şiddetle karıştırıyor.{/n} "Yanlış, çok yanlış!" {n}Kollarını başının etrafına doluyor, hafifçe sallanıyor.{/n} "Gerçek gibi görünüyorlar sadece {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri fakat yakından bakınca... Yarısı hayalet, diğer yarısı da ruhları kesilip alınmış hâlde dolaşan bedenler. Burası bir ölüm tuzağı, kötü bir yer. Buradan derhâl çıkmalıyız, hâlâ hayatta olanları da yanımıza almalıyız."
languages.original_text: {n}Idira plunges both hands into her hair, violently tousling it.{/n} "Wrong, this is wrong!" {n}She wraps her arms around her head, swaying slightly.{/n} "They only seem real, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but when you look closer... half are ghosts, and the other half are walking around with their souls cut out. This is a deathtrap, a bad place. We need to get out of here, and take any still alive with us."

traits.locale_text: {n}İdira, iki elini de saçlarına daldırıp şiddetle karıştırıyor.{/n} "Yanlış, çok yanlış!" {n}Kollarını başının etrafına doluyor, hafifçe sallanıyor.{/n} "Gerçek gibi görünüyorlar sadece {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri fakat yakından bakınca... Yarısı hayalet, diğer yarısı da ruhları kesilip alınmış hâlde dolaşan bedenler. Burası bir ölüm tuzağı, kötü bir yer. Buradan derhâl çıkmalıyız, hâlâ hayatta olanları da yanımıza almalıyız."

languages.text: {n}Idira se mete ambas manos en la melena y la revuelve con fuerza.{/n} «¡Mal! ¡Esto está mal!». {n}Rodea la cabeza con los brazos y se mece suavemente.{/n} «Puede parecer real, mi{mf|lord|lady}, pero si lo mira de verdad... la mitad son fantasmas, y la otra mitad deambula sin sus almas. Esta es una trampa mortal, un lugar espantoso. Tenemos que salir de aquí, llevándonos a cualquiera que siga vivo de verdad».
languages.original_text: {n}Idira plunges both hands into her hair, violently tousling it.{/n} "Wrong, this is wrong!" {n}She wraps her arms around her head, swaying slightly.{/n} "They only seem real, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but when you look closer... half are ghosts, and the other half are walking around with their souls cut out. This is a deathtrap, a bad place. We need to get out of here, and take any still alive with us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Idira se mete ambas manos en la melena y la revuelve con fuerza.{/n} «¡Mal! ¡Esto está mal!». {n}Rodea la cabeza con los brazos y se mece suavemente.{/n} «Puede parecer real, mi{mf|lord|lady}, pero si lo mira de verdad... la mitad son fantasmas, y la otra mitad deambula sin sus almas. Esta es una trampa mortal, un lugar espantoso. Tenemos que salir de aquí, llevándonos a cualquiera que siga vivo de verdad».

languages.text: {n}Idira rauft sich mit beiden Händen die Haare.{/n} "Falsch, das ist falsch!" {n}Sie schlingt die Arme um ihren Kopf und schwankt leicht.{/n} "Sie wirken nur real, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, aber wenn Ihr genau hinseht ... die Hälfte von ihnen sind Geister, die anderen laufen herum, als hätte man ihnen die Seele geraubt. Das ist eine Todesfall, ein übler Ort. Wir müssen hier raus und alle mitnehmen, die noch leben."
languages.original_text: {n}Idira plunges both hands into her hair, violently tousling it.{/n} "Wrong, this is wrong!" {n}She wraps her arms around her head, swaying slightly.{/n} "They only seem real, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but when you look closer... half are ghosts, and the other half are walking around with their souls cut out. This is a deathtrap, a bad place. We need to get out of here, and take any still alive with us."

Das ist eine Todesfall, ein übler Ort. Wir müssen hier raus und alle mitnehmen, die noch leben."

languages.text: {n}イディラは両手を髪に突っ込み、激しくかき乱す。{/n}「間違ってる、これは間違ってる！」{n}彼女は頭を抱え、わずかに体を揺らす。{/n}「見かけは本物に見えるだけ、{mf|閣下|閣下}、でもよく見ると…半分は幽霊、もう半分は魂を抜かれたまま歩き回っている。ここは死の罠、忌まわしい場所よ。ここから抜け出さなきゃ、まだ生きている者は連れてね。」
languages.original_text: {n}Idira plunges both hands into her hair, violently tousling it.{/n} "Wrong, this is wrong!" {n}She wraps her arms around her head, swaying slightly.{/n} "They only seem real, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but when you look closer... half are ghosts, and the other half are walking around with their souls cut out. This is a deathtrap, a bad place. We need to get out of here, and take any still alive with us."
